title: deep-audit plan (v1)
description: Canonical contract for the /deep-audit plan artifact (reviews/audit-plan-<date>.json). The JSON IS the plan — the markdown consult view is derived from it and regenerated on divergence. planVersion is pinned so the engine story and the eventual differential (C-ledger) mode can extend this contract with an explicit version bump, never silently. All properties are required (the repo's schema convention).

date.description: YYYY-MM-DD compile date; also the artifact filename key.

target.description: Absolute path of the audited repo root.

profile.description: Detection snapshot carried from /dev-audit steps 1–2 (ecosystems, frameworks, tests, CI, secret signals — redacted, domain, Table B tier). Free-form object; informational.

unitMap.description: Deterministic unit groups with their fixed-predicate signals.

chunkUnits.description: Chunk-adjusted unit count (files >400 LOC count as ceil(LOC/400)).

rows.description: The plan. One row per (lens, altitude, scope) identity — the Table P collision rule guarantees uniqueness.

runs.description: units × depth factor (light ceil(units/3), standard units, deep 2×units).

omissionRisk.description: One line: what goes unexamined if this row is cut.

why.description: Accumulated Table P rule reasons (and any override), e.g. 'P8: legacy'.

overrides.description: Told-overrides applied after Table P, recorded before→after. Empty array when none.

effect.description: Before→after description of what it changed.

assumptions.description: Every pricing constant, printed: per-run tokens, concurrency, per-run minutes, chunk size, churn window/threshold.

notCovered.description: Explicit exclusions: excluded globs, dropped lenses/altitudes, L0 reserved.
